perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap and glasses stands in front of a neutral grey background, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. (2) Visual transitions to a series of images showing Taylor Swift on a concert stage wearing sparkling outfits and playing a pink acoustic guitar. (3) The man reappears briefly, then the screen shows photos of Lucy Guo, first in a professional setting at a conference and then in a casual photo with a male colleague. (4) A website screenshot of 'Scale AI' appears, followed by a graphic of falling money icons and sparkling dollar symbols over the speaker. (5) The video ends with a shot of Lucy Guo outdoors in a festival crowd wearing sunglasses.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music begins. (A) Vocals: Adult male speaking Mandarin in an energetic and clear tone. (B) BGM: Upbeat electronic rhythm. (C) Ambient noise: Minimal/Studio quiet. (D) SFX: None. (2) The soundscape continues with the same energy. (A) Vocals: Male continues narration. (B) BGM: Constant upbeat rhythm. (D) SFX: A sharp 'ding' sound accompanies the appearance of text. (3) Financial figures are mentioned. (D) SFX: A cash register/money jingling sound effect plays as dollar signs appear visually. (4) The music and vocals maintain their pace until the speaker finishes his sentence and the track ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '最年輕的女億萬富翁' (The youngest female billionaire) - Hook/Title. (2) Functional Text: 'Taylor Swift' - Identifying the person shown. (3) Functional Text: '超過台幣500億的身價' (Net worth over NT$50 billion) - Informational detail. (4) Decorative Text: 'Scale' - Company logo appearing as a sticker. (5) Functional Text: 'Lucy Guo' - Identifying the person shown. (6) Functional Text: '12億美元' (1.2 billion USD) and '新台幣390億元' (NT$39 billion) - Financial data with an emphatic tone. (7) Functional Text: '3c Tim哥' - Social media handles in the top left corner.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Comparative Case Study (Taylor Swift vs. Lucy Guo) -> Financial Breakdown -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (male), Taylor Swift (female), Lucy Guo (female), and 1 male colleague in a photo.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a grey flat cap and a blue polo shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a plain indoor studio wall. Secondary backgrounds include concert stages with bright lights, office environments, and a sunny outdoor festival scene with a crowd.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Studio lighting on the main character; stage lighting and natural sunlight in secondary clips.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut between voice-over segments; music is a continuous loop.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Comparison -> Evidence -> Final Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide entertaining and educational news about wealth and successful entrepreneurs, specifically focusing on the transition of the title for the 'youngest female billionaire' from Taylor Swift to Lucy Guo.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is structured as a news commentary or trivia segment without any specific product call-to-action.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of '3c Tim哥' branding and signature flat cap attire.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows standard high-engagement short-form video practices, using bright subtitles, fast cuts, and trending financial topics to attract viewers.
